# Getting and Cleaning Data Course Project

This repository contains the final project for the Coursera **Getting and Cleaning Data** course.

## Files

* run_analysis.R – Script that downloads and processes the dataset
* CodeBook.md – Description of the variables and transformations
* tidy_dataset.txt – Final tidy dataset generated by the script

## Dataset

Human Activity Recognition Using Smartphones Dataset

## Processing Steps

1. Merge the training and test datasets
2. Extract only mean and standard deviation measurements
3. Use descriptive activity names
4. Label the dataset with descriptive variable names
5. Create a tidy dataset with the average of each variable for each activity and each subject
